headline: Quanex, Masco, and Hayward Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire "over" and threatened more strikes, driving oil prices higher and lifting bond yields in an inflation scare that hit anything tied to housing.
